name: contextify
description: Contextify — persistent context engine for AI coding assistants: screenshot compression + a live Software Knowledge Graph of your codebase.

plugins.name: contextify
plugins.description: Persistent context engine — an eye and a memory for your AI. 16 tools: Screenshot Blueprint eye-loop (screenshot → wireframe → mapped to the code that implements it → design variants), live Software Knowledge Graph (React/Next.js, NestJS + Flutter — full-stack, incremental), flow tracing, what-if simulation, visual Mermaid explanations, impact analysis + regression risk, architecture score, feature graph, temporal timeline, token-savings report, and the Rosetta framework-translator skill (onboard into Django/Spring/FastAPI/Flask/Go/Rust codebases through the framework you already know). Interactive visualization + CLI. 100% local.
